sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bin (id UInt32, value Int32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_bin (id, value, created_at) VALUES (1, 14, now());
UPDATE test_bin SET value = 42 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bin(value) AS binary_value FROM test_bin;
SELECT bin(created_at) AS created_at_binary FROM test_bin;
